creator: rotkap@gmx.de
text:
A fresh installteion of audio/clementine-player plays mp3 but not ogg audio.

"Your GStreamer installation is missing a plug-in." 

My installed gstreamer ports:

gstreamer-0.10.35   Development framework for creating media applications
gstreamer-plugins-0.10.35_1,3 GStreamer written collection of plugins handling several me
gstreamer-plugins-bad-0.10.22,3 Bad gstreamer-plugins
gstreamer-plugins-flac-0.10.30,3 Gstreamer free lossless audio encoder/decoder plugin
gstreamer-plugins-gio-0.10.35,3 Gstreamer gio (Glib I/O) plugin
gstreamer-plugins-good-0.10.30,3 Good gstreamer-plugins
gstreamer-plugins-mad-0.10.18,3 Gstreamer mp3 decoder plugin
gstreamer-plugins-mp3-0.10.0_1 Gstreamer Plugins Mp3 decoder meta-port
gstreamer-plugins-ogg-0.10.35,3 Gstreamer Ogg bitstream plugin
gstreamer-plugins-soup-0.10.30,3 Gstreamer soup http src plugin
gstreamer-plugins-ugly-0.10.18,3 Ugly gstreamer-plugins

How-To-Repeat: start clementine-player and try to play any ogg file
